questions.question:
CLANDESTINE is to SECRECY as ....

  • ERUDITE is to IGNORANCE
  • FRIGID is to TEMPERATURE
  • FELONIOUS is to ASSAULT
  • CANDID is to HONESTY
  • JEALOUS is to GREED

CLASH is to DISAGREE as ...

  • FEVER is to RASH
  • REBUKE is to CRITICIZE
  • HARM is to DEVASTATE
  • CASTIGATE is to PRAISE
  • EXPLODE is to DESTROY

SELFLESS is to GREED as

  • VENERABLE is to AGE
  • JOVIAL is to HUMOR
  • RASH is to CAUTION
  • RAVENOUS is to AMBITION
  • OMNIPOTENT is to POVERTY

RESILIENT is to RECOVER as ...

  • FORGIVING is to DEPRECATE
  • RESTRAINED is to CONTROL
  • STRIDENT is to COMPLIMENT
  • UBIQUITOUS is to PROSPER
  • VOLUBLE is to WHISPER

CREDIBLE is to BELIEVE as ...

  • BRITTLE is to BREAK
  • INHUMANE is to PUNISH
  • DYNAMIC is to IDOLIZE
  • CANCEROUS is to HEAL
  • RUSTY is to CORRODE


English Language: Verbal Reasoning / Verbal Analogy HELP
